title: rondeletia selleana
intro: Rondeletia selleana, also known as the white fringed orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rondeletia selleana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
